package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "encoding/json"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for go_perf_layer_serialization_json_marshal_for_deep_equal: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Serialization and deserialization. Flag json.Marshal used only to compare structures or build equality keys.
type CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationJsonMarshalForDeepEqualDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationJsonMarshalForDeepEqualModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationJsonMarshalForDeepEqualRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationJsonMarshalForDeepEqualModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationJsonMarshalForDeepEqualService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationJsonMarshalForDeepEqualRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationJsonMarshalForDeepEqualAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoPerfLayerSerializationJsonMarshalForDeepEqual(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationJsonMarshalForDeepEqualDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_serialization_json"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    for _, item := range items {
        a, _ := json.Marshal(item)
        b, _ := json.Marshal(item)
        if string(a) == string(b) {
            _ = len(a)
        }
    }
    perf_layer_serialization_json_marshal_positive := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "serialization": 3, "json": 4, "marshal": 5, "deep": 6}
    perf_layer_serialization_json_marshal_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_positive_0 := perf_layer_serialization_json_marshal_positive["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_positive_0
    layer_positive_1 := perf_layer_serialization_json_marshal_positive["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_positive_1
    serialization_positive_2 := perf_layer_serialization_json_marshal_positive["serialization"] + len(input)
    _ = serialization_positive_2
    json_positive_3 := fmt.Sprintf("json:%s", input)
    _ = json_positive_3
    marshal_positive_4 := fmt.Sprintf("marshal:%s", input)
    _ = marshal_positive_4
    deep_positive_5 := perf_layer_serialization_json_marshal_positive["deep"] + len(input)
    _ = deep_positive_5
    return nil
}
